I1MM I1MM_MACULAR_DEGN (I1MM) Macular Degeneration CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - sensory - macular degeneration. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
304 I1N I1N_MISS_LIMB (I1N) Missing Limb CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - musculoskeletal - missing limb. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
305 I1NN I1NN_ALLERGIES (I1NN) Allergies CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - other - allergies. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
306 I1O I1O_OSTEOPORO (I1O) Osteoporosis CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases
